notes: ESS LFP contract can support Stage 2, but EV contract loss and margin/FCF gaps keep Stage 3 deferred.
Tesla customer and contract value were not enough; value reduction from headline contract to near-zero is a hard 4C calibration case.
SK On ESS pivot is Stage 2 watch, but the earlier EV battery thesis had debt/loss evidence close to 4C-watch.
The Tesla ESS report is only Stage 1 attention because company confirmation, volume call-off, margin, and EPS/FCF are missing.
Separator demand is not structural Green when final EV demand, customer finances, utilization, and OPM are weakening.
Lithium price spikes and contract headlines must be separated from actual customer orders, margin, and FCF.
Precursor and group integration stories are not Stage 3 without outside customers, utilization, OPM, FCF, and spread evidence.
